mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile ( account_id, nickname, handle, intro, is_private, birth_date, gender, career_years, hati_code, account_number, verification_status ) VALUES ( #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{intro, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPrivate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{careerYears, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{hatiCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{verificationStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS accountId, nickname AS nickname, handle AS handle, hati_code AS hatiCode, gender AS gender FROM user_profile WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
